understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to solve each level by getting every selectable piece onto the goal tiles marked with a '+' so that all goals are occupied simultaneously, which triggers WIN and advances until the full game is completed.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement/actions were turn-based with a limited step budget per level. A piece had to be selected to act; CLICKing on certain grid positions could relocate the selected piece (notably to the position of another selectable, effectively swapping/teleporting to that square), while CLICKs on blocked/invalid tiles (walls/obstacles or unreachable squares) had no effect. WIN required correct final placement of all pieces at the same time, not one-by-one.

history.summary: Level 1 attempt 2/2 failed after 64 turns. No attempts remaining.
Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to solve each level by getting every selectable piece onto the goal tiles marked with a '+' so that all goals are occupied simultaneously, which triggers WIN and advances until the full game is completed.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement/actions were turn-based with a limited step budget per level. A piece had to be selected to act; CLICKing on certain grid positions could relocate the selected piece (notably to the position of another selectable, effectively swapping/teleporting to that square), while CLICKs on blocked/invalid tiles (walls/obstacles or unreachable squares) had no effect. WIN required correct final placement of all pieces at the same time, not one-by-one.
